items.title: Navigation: add settings header return-to-board chip
items.description: Add a compact 'Back to board' quick-jump chip in /settings header to complete bidirectional board/settings navigation.

items.title: Board UX: clarify saved-view helper with one-click reset hint
items.description: Keep board toolbar affordances explicit after active view helper rollout.

items.title: Board UX: add filter-empty-state count hint for quick diagnosis
items.description: Show compact helper explaining how many active filters are narrowing board results when no cards match.
